description_long: This is a rectangular, upright vending machine with a predominantly blue metal exterior that shows signs of wear and minor rust, suggesting frequent use in an outdoor or urban environment. The front face features a transparent display window with three rows of visible products, likely beverages, arranged behind clear panels. Below the product display is a wide, dark retrieval slot, and to the right, a payment interface with a coin slot, a bill acceptor, and a yellow button or lever. The sides and back are plain blue metal, with the back featuring a vented panel near the bottom for cooling. The machine's overall design is utilitarian, with no visible branding or decorative elements, and its robust construction implies durability for public use.
description: A blue, weathered vending machine with a transparent product display, payment interface, and retrieval slot on the front; sides and back are plain metal.
description_view_0: Front view shows the transparent product display, payment interface, yellow button, and wide retrieval slot.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a plain blue metal surface with visible seams and minor wear, no interactive features.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a solid blue metal panel with a vented section near the bottom, no access points or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain blue metal surface with seams and some wear.
attribute_display_panel: A transparent display window occupies the upper central portion of the front, showing three rows of products; no digital or illuminated display is visible.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is located on the right side of the front, featuring a coin slot, a bill acceptor, and a yellow button or lever.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A single yellow button or lever is visible on the payment interface; no keypad or multiple selection buttons are present.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, rectangular retrieval slot is located at the lower front, beneath the product display window; it appears open and unflapped.
